creator: rwestlun@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 163955
update to 2.2.0

Update fish to 2.2.0

- remove files/patch-env__universal__common.cpp, which is no longer necessary (see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=196661)

- remove fishd and fish_pager from Makefile (removed upstream)

- add all the new completion functions to pkg-plist

It passes portlint and is working on my systems.
